name: WLF_SKILLS_ADVISOR_JOBS
description: This table stores the details of the processes used to generate dynamic skills for the list of learning items specified by a HCM List.

columns.Name: PROCESS_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Specifies the category of the bulk advisor job.

columns.Name: HCM_LIST_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier for the HCM List which represents a list of learning items.

columns.Name: PROVIDER_ACCOUNT_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier for the external provider configuration account.

columns.Name: PROCESS_NAME
columns.Comments: Specifies the process name used to generate skills for the learning items.

columns.Name: PROCESS_DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: Specifies the process description used to generate skills for the learning items.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Specfies status of the process used to generate skills for the learning items.

columns.Name: ADDITIONAL_INFO
columns.Comments: Captures the additional metadate information specific to a given bulk advisor request

columns.Name: LATEST_PROCESSING_JOB_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier for the latest ESS job used to process the skills for the list of learning items.

columns.Name: LATEST_PROCESSED_DATE
columns.Comments: Specfies the timestamp when the process used to generate skills for the learning items is completed.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier for the person who created the process.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
